id.description: The ID of the newly created authentication method (automatically generated by the application)

name.description: A human-readable label to identify the authentication method.

totp_secret.description: Base32 encoded secret for TOTP generation

phone_number.description: Applies to phone authentication methods only. The destination phone number used to send verification codes via text and voice.

email.description: Applies to email authentication methods only. The email address used to send verification messages.

key_id.description: Applies to webauthn authenticators only. The id of the credential.

public_key.description: Applies to webauthn authenticators only. The public key.

aaguid.description: Applies to passkeys only. Authenticator Attestation Globally Unique Identifier.

relying_party_identifier.description: Applies to webauthn authenticators only. The relying party identifier.
